description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the clojure:lein-2.7.0 Docker image with a global before_script exporting LEIN_SNAPSHOTS_IN_RELEASE=true and a shared cache key all-y-all for the .local-m2 directory. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs apt-get update -y, apt-get install postgresql-client -y, psql -h postgres -U postgres < db-setup.sql, echo $DATABASE_URL, cp resources/test-config.default.edn ./test-config.edn, lein with-profile test run migrate, lein with-profile test cloverage --codecov, and bash <(curl -s https://codecov.io/bash) -f target/coverage/codecov.json -t $CODECOV_KEY, uses the postgres:latest service, restores the Maven cache before the script, and copies it back after the script; it does not produce artifacts. In the build stage add an uberjar job that runs lein uberjar, restores and saves the .local-m2 cache, and publishes target/uberjar/memento.jar as an artifact, running only on git tags. In the deploy stage add a production job that runs lein uberjar then HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_PRODUCTION_API_KEY lein heroku deploy, also restores and saves the cache, stores the same jar as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
